REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (5 Sunview Drive, San Francisco, Ca 94131-1618)
Off Calendar Jun-15-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rowena Navia for Kerry Abram (Administrator).

The sale was confirmed at $1,206,750.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). The Probate Examiner will review the matter for determination of an appropriate amount for the additional bond.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
